findings.title: Connection pool and DB pressure tuning
findings.risk: Too-low pool size can increase latency or reduce throughput.

findings.title: Use DbContext pooling for hot API requests
findings.risk: Requires compatibility validation for context state and interceptors.

findings.title: Public detail DTO/payload contract audit
findings.risk: Can break public rendering if frontend-visible fields are removed without tests.

findings.title: Public list exact count strategy
findings.risk: Requires API/UI contract changes if exact total pages are removed.

findings.title: Work detail with videos query shape
findings.risk: Joining videos into detail can duplicate large content and regress performance.

findings.title: Response compression
findings.risk: Compression can consume CPU on a 2 CPU shared host.

nonRecommendations: Do not reduce pageSize=12 for the load test.
Do not switch to seeded/light detail targets as a performance fix.
Do not use cache as the first fix.
Do not add covering indexes that include large public detail body columns.
recommendation: Proceed first with deployed DB pool verification/enforcement and DbContext pooling validation, then rerun the same realistic Real Backend Test matrix.
